title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: China and Brazil join pledge to triple global nuclear energy capacity
items.description:

items.title: Paris Agreement watchdog weighs action against countries missing climate plan
items.description:

items.title: We must invest in early-warning systems to tackle crises like Kenya’s drought
items.description:

items.title: New summit in Colombia seeks to revive stalled UN talks on fossil fuel transition
items.description:

items.title: How women transformed a Vanuatu community with off-grid solar

items.title: Middle East crisis increases Southeast Asia’s coal risk
